sentiment.reasoning: The completion of a facility upgrade is an operational milestone that should improve efficiency over the long term.

headlines.headline: Orevov Solutions to host investor day focused on renewable storage strategy

headlines.headline: Nolvol Resources files routine patent applications in precision manufacturing

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a business unit introduces significant uncertainty regarding the future structure and value of the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
